## Summary
- What changed:
- Why:

## Documentation Sync (Required)
- [ ] I identified all affected docs for this change.
- [ ] I updated all relevant `.md` files in this PR.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` and/or `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md` if scope/behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/contracts/api.md` for API contract changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I updated `docs/architecture/*.md` for architecture/boundary/deployment changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I updated `docs/decisions/adr.md` for architecture decisions/trade-offs (if applicable).
- [ ] I updated `docs/release-notes-v1.md` for user-visible behavior changes (if applicable).
- [ ] If `.docx` exists for affected area, I updated both `.docx` and matching authoritative `.md`.
- [ ] `docs/INDEX.md` links are still valid.

## Validation
- [ ] Tests/typecheck pass (or not required for docs-only change).
